title: FEMUR Manifest (Flat Output)
description: Schema for the manifest.json produced in flat (non-bucketed) output mode. Describes the contents and provenance of a FEMUR export run.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (with timezone) when the export run started.

command.description: Full CLI command with arguments used to generate this output.

host_map.description: Number of host map entries written.

iavm_date_generated.description: Date the IAVM cross-reference XML was generated. Present only when --iavm-file is used.

errors.description: Fetch errors, present only when one or more datasets failed to fetch. Each entry names the dataset and the error message.

partial.description: Datasets whose counts are incomplete because the fetch aborted mid-stream after partial records had already been written. Present only when one or more streaming datasets failed. Treat these datasets' counts as a lower bound, not a final total.
